Leaderboard.description: Rank active skills by successful MCP calls. When usage is tied, the higher average rating ranks first, followed by review count.

periodDescriptions.day: Successful calls recorded during the current UTC day.
periodDescriptions.month: Successful calls recorded during the current UTC calendar month.
periodDescriptions.year: Successful calls recorded during the current UTC calendar year.

Leaderboard.empty: No active skills are available for this ranking yet.
Leaderboard.methodology: Only successful get_skill_md and get_skill_reference usage events count. Rankings use UTC calendar periods. Ties are resolved by average rating, then review count, title, and skill ID for a stable order.
